chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 380 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 27-04-2023 Mr. Hussain Farooq Jatoi, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioner after arguing the matter at some length does not press this petition; however, states that the petitioner for the redressal of his grievances shall approach the Service Tribunal. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
